text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho, one of the most
formidable G1 events and a race of utmost
importance to the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Mejiro Bright promised, she cannot let victory
escape her here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please don't look so grim.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Everything will be all right. I will win, just as I said.
I'll deliver the plaque to the Mejiro family with my
own hands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Bright, I trust you understand what lies ahead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Before you can properly stand in this new
generation of speed-first racing, you must first
display the strength to be a representative of the
Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Perform well in a prestigious long-distance G1,
and then win a medium-distance race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I will run just like you did on that day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I see. If you can win the spring Tenno Sho, then
perhaps... Perhaps that glory that has escaped
our grasp since my own race will return.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Winning will make you a fitting successor. But
first, you must be able to stand at my side.
